EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IItemTemplate

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an item template.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("205B20A1-3BC1-4270-ACC9-6F73C1840007")]
public interface IItemTemplate

Properties

Enabled

Indicates whether the item template is active.

bool Enabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IntersectFootprints

Indicates whether the footprint of items constructed using this template is computed using the intersection of the footprints of all participating input items.

bool IntersectFootprints { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

The name of the item template.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

OutputDatasetTag

The output dataset tag associated with the item template. This property determines the tag of the outgoing item constructed using this template.

string OutputDatasetTag { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

PrimaryInputDatasetTag

Tag identifying the item URI that references a dataset from which all properties are copied over to the outgoing dataset.

string PrimaryInputDatasetTag { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

RasterFunctionTemplate

The raster function template associated with the item template.

IRasterFunctionTemplate RasterFunctionTemplate { get; set; }

Property Value

IRasterFunctionTemplate

Examples

Sample Snippet
